hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; case "$f" in */docs/technical-overview.md|*/CLAUDE.md) ;; */api/v2/generate-theme.js|*/api/v2/chat.js|*/api/v2/prompt-test.js|*/api/v2/quality-monitor.js|*/api/v2/admin.js|*/api/v2/ratings.js|*/api/v2/lib/error-reporter.js|*/vercel.json|*/supabase/*.sql) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"Reminder: If this change affects architecture, AI system, quality pipeline, ratings, metrics, or user flow, update docs/technical-overview.md and the Last updated date."}}' ;; esac; }
